title: Synthesis of single-crystalline carbon nanothreads from 1-naphthoic acid with high anisotropic thermal conductivity

abstract: Employing a design strategy focused on single-crystal-to-single-crystal transformation, we synthesized high-quality carbon nanothread single crystals from 1-naphthoic acid by using high-pressure and annealing approaches.
